full_text:
Guo Ban (Changgong) 郭頒 (長公)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Ban (郭頒), styledChanggong (長公). Author of the Shiyu. Criticized by Pei Songzhi. Guo Ban was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
